untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of EADB pattern formation and volume shape classification (dome vs U vs random), which are pattern recognition tasks not expressible as simple indicator thresholds. The exact volume shape analysis and pattern detection logic cannot be translated into the allowed indicator-based rule syntax. Additionally, no exit conditions were provided (AUTHOR_SILENT), so reversal-based exits are inferred but may not reflect the author's actual intent.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture breakout volume intensity using vol_ratio_20 (volume relative to 20-day average) as a proxy for 30-day average comparison. Entry direction is context-dependent based on market regime (bull vs bear). Exit conditions use SMA_20 crossover as a reasonable reversal signal. The core pattern matching and volume shape analysis requires custom pattern detection logic outside the scope of this rule engine.
